_comment: NetDesign AI — Claude Desktop MCP configuration
_instructions: 1. Copy the 'mcpServers' block into your Claude Desktop config file:
2. Replace /FULL/PATH/TO/Network-Automation with your actual clone path.
4. You should see 'NetDesign AI' appear in the MCP tools panel (hammer icon).

_alternative_docker._comment: Run via Docker if you prefer containerised execution

_sse_remote._comment: SSE transport for remote / team-shared MCP server
_instructions: Start the server: python mcp_server.py --transport sse --port 8001
Then point Claude Desktop at the SSE endpoint:
